pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 17 migration and Spring Boot 3 requirements.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as a baseline; using Spring Boot 2.7 with Java 17 is possible but prevents access to Spring Boot 3 features and native compatibility, and the recipe explicitly targets Spring Boot 3.3.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 17 to target the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 11, failing to utilize Java 17 features and potentially causing incompatibilities with libraries (like Spring Boot 3) that require Java 17.
